title: Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Gender Specialist and IT Assistant Posts
short_info: The latest Salem District Women Empowerment Hub (Salem DHEW) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Gender Specialist-II and IT Assistant posts! Published on 12 May 2026 at the official website, this recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants with a Post Graduate degree in Social Work/Social Disciplines (for Gender Specialist-II) or Graduation with computer/IT knowledge (for IT Assistant), and within the maximum age limit of 35 years, can apply offline on or before 11 June 2026. Find all details about the Salem DHEW new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, applica

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work / Social Disciplines, Graduation with working knowledge in computers/IT
qualification.details: Gender Specialist-II: Post Graduate Degree in Social Work / Social Disciplines with a minimum of 3 years of experience in gender-related programs and services in government or private organizations. IT Assistant: Graduation with working knowledge in computers/IT and a minimum of 3 years of experience in data management, process documentation, and web-based reporting at the state or district level in government or private organizations.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Salem DHEW Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026 is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Gender Specialist-II and IT Assistant positions in the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Gender Specialist-II post?
faq.answer: For the Gender Specialist-II post, candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree in Social Work or Social Disciplines, along with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under this recruitment is 35 years. Age relaxation details, if any, will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the IT Assistant position?
faq.answer: The IT Assistant position offers a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. In which mode should the application be submitted for Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications for the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026 must be submitted in offline mode, likely through post, as indicated in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the experience required for the IT Assistant post?
faq.answer: The IT Assistant post requires a minimum of 3 years of experience in data management, process documentation, and web-based reporting at the state or district level.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided information, no application fee is mentioned for the Salem DHEW Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to confirm this in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Gender Specialist-II and IT Assistant are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be downloaded from the official website of the Salem District Women Empowerment Hub. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.
